news.title: Sam Bankman-Fried's past political cash gives AI PAC fuel for bashing NY candidate Bores
news.summary: A mailer from Think Big PAC told voters that the Democratic U.S. House candidate once got $100,000 in support from the former head of failed global exchange FTX.

news.title: Senators say they've reached compromise on yield to advance crypto market bill
news.summary: One of the major sticking points on the crypto market structure bill may be resolved, at least enough to move toward a Senate hearing to advance the bill.

news.title: Kalshi gets temporary Nevada ban in dispute over sports betting
news.summary: A Nevada court issued a 14-day ban on a wide range of contracts from prediction market firm Kalshi as the firm continues battling with state regulators.
